name: Pooja R. Sonar
tagline: Full-stack software developer specializing in scalable web applications and cutting-edge technology solutions
about: Results-driven Software Developer with proven expertise in building enterprise-grade web applications using modern technology stacks. Currently pursuing B.Tech in Information Technology with an outstanding 9.2 CGPA. Demonstrates advanced proficiency in full-stack development, specializing in MERN stack, Next.js, and TypeScript. Successfully delivered diverse projects spanning e-commerce platforms, AI-driven applications, and IoT solutions, with a track record of academic and competitive achievements.
highlights: Developed scalable web applications using Next.js and TypeScript
Built e-commerce platform features for EV bikes marketplace
Created reusable UI components using Storybook
Won 2nd place in all Goa science day innovative project building competition
Secured third position at GDSC ADGITM hackathon

projects.name: AccessAI - CodeQuest
projects.description: Comprehensive AI-powered coding preparation platform featuring gamified learning experiences. Enables users to master programming languages, including Solidity for smart contract development, through interactive challenges and personalized learning paths.

projects.name: Maxiple Technology Website
projects.description: Custom-built corporate website for a laptop repair services company, delivered as a freelance project. Features responsive design, service portfolio showcase, and client engagement functionalities.

projects.name: Chess.com Backend Clone
projects.description: Comprehensive backend system replicating Chess.com functionality using MERN stack architecture. Implements sophisticated API development, real-time gameplay mechanics, user authentication, and database optimization for seamless chess gaming experiences.

projects.name: Arduino Floor Cleaner
projects.description: Award-winning autonomous floor cleaning device engineered with Arduino microcontroller technology. Features smartphone-controlled remote operation through custom mobile application, securing 2nd place at the all-Goa Science Day competition.
